boys_count.description: Total number of boys in the group, used in the combination calculation C(100,50).

girls_count.description: Total number of girls in the group, used in the combination calculation C(100,50).

total_count.description: Total number of children (boys + girls = 200), used in the combination calculation C(200,100).

group_size.description: Size of each of the two equal groups (200/2 = 100), used as the selection size in C(200,100) and the equal split target (50 boys and 50 girls per group).
